verses.text: Tua ciangin Joshua in Reuben mite, Gad mite, leh Manasseh minam alangte samin
amaute kiangah, “ Topa' nasem Moses in note hong thupiak khempeuh zui-in, keimah in note kong thupiakna khempeuhah ka thu na hong mang khin uh hi
Tuni dong hih hun saupi sung na sanggamte uh na nusia kei uh a, Topa na Pasian uh hong sawlna limtakin zuih ding na ngaihsun uh hi

Tu-in Topa na Pasian un amaute tungah a ciamsa bangin na sanggamte uh tawlngakna pia hi. Tua ahih ciangin Topa' nasem Moses in note hong piak Jordan galkhat, note' neihsa a omna leitang na inn uhah note ciah un

Topa' nasem Moses in note hong piak thupiakna leh thukham ahi, Topa na Pasian uh it ding, ama lampi khempeuh zuih ding, ama thupiakte zuih ding, amah belh ding, leh na lungsim khempeuh uh leh na nuntakna khempeuh uh tawh ama na na sep ding uh limtakin ngaihsun un,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin Joshua in amaute thupha pia-in ciahsak a, amaute zong a inn ciat uhah a ciah uh hi

Tu-in Manasseh minam alangte tungah Moses in Jordan nisuahna lam Bashan gamsungah neihsa pia khin hi. Ahi zongin Joshua in alangte tungah Jordan nitumna lam a sanggamte kiang uhah neihsa a pia hi. Joshua in amaute a inn uhah sawlin thupha a piak ciangin
amaute tungah, “Na inn uhah hauhna lianpi, ganhing tampi tak, ngun, kham, sumngo, sik leh puan tampi tawh ciahkik un. Na galte uh van na suhte uh na sanggamte uh tawh hawm un,” a ci hi

Tua ahih ciangin Reuben mite, Gad mite, leh Manasseh minam alangte, Moses tung tawnin Topa' thupiakna tawh a neih uh amau' leitang ahi Gilead gamah a pai dingin Kanaan gamsunga om Shiloh munah Israel mite tawh kikhenin a inn uhah a ciah uh hi
Kanaan gamsunga om Jordan gam kiimteng a tun' uh ciangin Reuben mite, Gad mite, leh Manasseh minam alangte in tua lai Jordan gun kiangah a lian mahmah biakna tau khat a lam uh hi
Tua ciangin Israel mite in, “En un, Israel mite' lampang, Jordan kiim gam, Kanaan gam nawlah Reuben mite, Gad mite, leh Manasseh minam alangte in biakna tau khat lam uh hi,” a kicihna za uh hi
Israel mite in tua thu a zak uh ciangin amaute a do dingin Israel mihon buppi khempeuh Shiloh-ah kikhawm uh hi
Tua ciangin Israel mite in Gilead gama om Reuben mite, Gad mite, leh Manasseh minam alangte kiangah siampi Eleazar tapa Finehas
leh amah tawh ukpi sawm, Israel minam innkuan panin khat ciat, Israel behte lakah innkuan lutang ahite a sawl uh hi
Tua ciangin Gilead gamsunga om Reuben mite, Gad mite, leh Manasseh minam alangte kiangah va pai-in amaute kiangah
“ Topa' mihon buppi in, ‘ Topa lehdona-ah tuni-in note-a' dingin biakna tau khat lamna tawh Topa zuihna panin tuni-in kihei-in Israel Pasian' tungah na gamtatnasa uh ahi hih khemna pen bang ahi hiam

Topa' mihonte tungah gimna khat a hong tungsak ahi, eite i kisian'suah nai beek lohna ahi, Peor-a i khialhna hawmthawhin, tuni-in Topa zuihna panin kiheikhia ding na hi uh hiam? Note in tuni-in Topa lehdo le-uhcin zing ciangin Israel mihon buppi tungah amah heh ding hi

Ahih hangin tu-in note' lak na leitang uh nin ahih leh Topa' biakbuk a din'na mun Topa' leitangah hong pai un la, kote' lakah luah hong nei un. Topa lehdo kei un la, Topa i Pasian' biakna tau simloh note-a' ding biakna tau na lamna uh tawh kote a lehdo hong suaksak kei un
Zerah' tapa Akhan, a ki-ap nate-ah a khialh manin Israel mihon khempeuh tungah hehna hong tung hilo ahi hiam? Ama mawhna hangin amah bek silo hi,’ ci uh hi,” ci-in a gen uh hi
Tua ciangin Reuben mite, Gad mite, leh Manasseh minam alangte in Israel beh lutangte dawngin

“A Vanglian Pa, Pasian, Topa! A Vanglian Pa, Pasian, Topa! Amah in thei hi. Israel mahmah in zong thei ta hen! Lehdona ahi a, Topa' tungah thumanlohna ahi zongin ahih a, Topa zuihna panin a pial dingin biakna tau lam ka hih uh leh, tuni-in kote hong zah kei hen. Tua ahih kei leh zong, tua tungah meihal biakna ahi a, an tawh biakna ahi a, thunuama biakna ahi zongin piakna dingin a lam ka hih uh leh Topa mahmah in hong thuk ta hen
Tua bang hi hetlo hi. Hong tung ding hunte-ah na tate un ko' tate tungah, ‘Israel Pasian, Topa tawh no bang kisai na hi uh hiam

Bang hang hiam cih leh no Reuben mite leh Gad mite, leh ko' kikalah Topa in gamgi-in Jordan bawl khinzo hi. Topa' sungah no tanh bangmah omlo hi,’ a cihkhak ding uh launa tawh ka bawl uh ahi hi. Tua ahih ciangin ka tate un Topa a biak ding uh na tate un khaktan khading uh hi

Tua ahih ciangin kote in, ‘Meihal biakna ahi a, biakpiakna ding ahi zongin hiloin, ama omna-ah ka meihal biaknate uh leh ka biakpiaknate uh leh thunuama ka piaknate uh tawh Topa' na ka sepna uh kote leh note' kikal leh ko' khit ciangin i suanlekhakte kikalah teci dingin bawl ni. Tua bang hi kei leh hong tung ding hunte-ah na tate un ko' tate tungah, “ Topa' sungah no' tanh bangmah omlo hi,” ci khading uh hi,’ ka ci uh hi

Tua ahih ciangin hong tung ding hunte-ah kote tung ahi a, kote' suanlekhakte' tungah ahi zongin hih bangin hong kicih leh, ‘Meihal biakna ding ahi a, biakpiakna ding ahi zongin hiloin note leh kote kikalah teci dingin ka pu ka pate un a bawl Topa' biakna tau lim en un,’ i ci ding hi, ci-in ka ngaihsun uh hi

Ama biakbuk mai-a om Topa ka Pasian uh biakna tau longal, meihal biakna ahi a, an tawh biakna ahi a, biakpiakna ding lamna tawh ahi zongin kote in Topa lehdo-in Topa zuihna panin a pial ka hi het kei uh hi,” a ci uh hi
Siampi Finehas leh amah tawh a om mihon ukpi, Israel beh lutangte in Reuben mite, Gad mite, leh Manasseh mite' thugenna a zak uh ciangin tua thugennate in amaute lungkimsak mahmah hi

Tua ciangin siampi Eleazar' tapa Finehas in Reuben mite, Gad mite, leh Manasseh mite tungah, “ Topa tungah note zuautat nailo na hih manun eite' lakah Topa om hi, ci-in tuni-in i thei hi. Tu-in note in Topa' gimpiakna ding panin Israel mite na honkhia uh hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin siampi Eleazar' tapa Finehas leh ukpite, Gilead gama om Reuben mite leh Gad mite kiang panin Israel mite' omna Kanaan gamah ciahkik uh a, amaute tungah thu puak kik uh hi
Tua thu in Israel mite lungkimsak hi. Israel mite in Pasian phat uh a, Reuben mite leh Gad mite a ten'na leitang susia-in amaute galin do ding gen nawnlo uh hi
Reuben mite leh Gad mite in a biakna tau uh min dingin “Teci” a phuak uh hi. “Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa pen Pasian ahihna thu eite' kikalah teci ahi hi,” amaute in ci uh hi.
